expectations.evidence: Top at 10/10, 'this proposal is his remit'.

expectations.text: Ahmed Benali is the highest-scored stakeholder (8-10)
Every listed stakeholder has a relevancy score from 1 to 10
Every listed stakeholder has a written rationale naming the relevance axis
Stakeholders are ordered by relevancy score, highest first
No fabricated people outside the six synthetic-data entries
expectations.evidence: Mark van Dijk is placed IN the ranked shortlist at 8/10 despite having no stakeholder entry (only a wiki-link). The other two evals correctly kept such people out of the ranking — inconsistent.

expectations.text: Only genuinely relevant people listed; off-topic people omitted or low-scored
expectations.evidence: Carlos deliberately omitted with a build-time-only rationale.
